name: Korean Bul Kogi
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sesame seeds -- toasted and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place meat in a bowl.
2. Add garlic, sesame seeds, green onions, pepper, sesame oil, soy sauce, and peanut/corn oil to the meat.
3. Toss until the meat is well coated with the marinade.
4. Cover and let marinate at room temperature for 4 hours.
5. Grill over hot coals, turning once, until the meat reaches your desired doneness.
You can also purchase this marinade ready-to-use in most oriental markets. It's really good when you take a large leaf of lettuce, put some white rice on it, add a bit of green onion and the meat (without the bones), then wrap it up.
